mapper.insert: insert into clazz(name, room, begin_date, end_date, master_id, subject, create_time, update_time) values (#{name}, #{room}, #{beginDate}, #{endDate}, #{masterId}, #{subject}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime})
mapper.delete:
delete from clazz where id in
#{id}
mapper.select:
select c.id, c.name, c.room, e.name masterName, c.begin_date, c.end_date, c.update_time, (case when now() < c.begin_date then '未开班' when now() > c.end_date then '已结课' else '在读中' end) status from clazz c left join emp e on c.master_id = e.id
c.name like concat('%', #{name}, '%') and c.end_date between #{beginDate} and #{endDate}

select c.*, (case c.subject when 1 then 'java' when 2 then '前端' when 3 then '大数据' when 4 then 'Python' when 5 then 'Go' when 6 then '嵌入式' end) subjectName, e.name masterName from clazz c left join emp e on c.master_id = e.id where c.id = #{id};
